name: Carrot (or Zucchini) Bread -- Lowfat
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a loaf pan or small ring pan.
3. Mix sugar and applesauce in a large bowl.
4. Combine dry ingredients with the wet mixture.
5. Add shredded carrots, vanilla extract, and beat in the eggs one at a time.
6. Stir in chopped walnuts (if using) and mix well.
7. Pour batter into the prepared pan and bake for 50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
8. Variation: Add 1/2 cup crushed pineapple (in juice, drained) to the batter.
